enrichment.summary: Kyle records a belated daily vlog from Boulder, recapping a day that included driving to work in unseasonably hot November weather, visiting his mom who watched three of his YouTube videos with him, and a lighthearted attempt to hint at borrowing money from her. He also mentions feeling slightly ill and plans to get a flu shot.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: playfully confident the subtle hinting strategy will work
finds it absurd and calls himself an idiot for not dressing for it
surprised and amused; sees it as progress
